data.body: PASS advisory dispositions: f92d6649bb0e0ba08, f99d50689570cabed, f793e912beab1eea5, and fe0ed66d14c604180 are accepted as one implementation constraint. The audit integration belongs in build_context/page assembly after audit_trail has produced best-effort stored data; it passes the available attestation, reduced ticket state, and repo root to compute_validity. Missing attestation, unexpected output, timeout, or exception must be caught at that boundary, logged, and rendered as clearly labeled derived-health unavailable without changing audit_trail never-raise behavior. Close remains governed by the existing validity gate and surfaces a human-readable failure; display failures never silently change allow/deny semantics. Also accept f102b0bc723751f16: advanced docs include pin-enforcement toggles and close-versus-claim freshness. Accept f70baef9b8bd44bcc for execution: include the actual close-error renderer command path after tracing its existing owner. Schema changes are additive, preserving existing fields and rollback compatibility.
